## Summary
<!-- What does this PR do? 1-3 bullet points. -->
-
-

## Type of Change
- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement
- [ ] `refactor` — no feature/bug
- [ ] `test` — test additions/corrections
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — build/deps

## Pre-Commit Checklist
<!-- Every box must be checked before requesting review. -->
- [ ] `pnpm run typecheck` passes — zero TypeScript errors
- [ ] `pnpm run lint` passes — zero ESLint / ruff warnings
- [ ] `mypy --strict` passes on changed Python files
- [ ] All new code has tests at required coverage
- [ ] New env vars documented in `.env.example`
- [ ] No secrets or API keys in the diff
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated if user-facing change
- [ ] ADR created if architectural decision was made

## Test Evidence
<!-- Screenshot, curl output, or test output demonstrating the feature works. -->

## Breaking Changes
<!-- List any breaking changes to API contracts, database schemas, or plugin API. -->
None
